description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run 3.6 tests that runs on push to releases/* and master branches, and on pull requests to those branches. Run two test jobs, one on ubuntu-20.04 with Python 3.6 and another on ubuntu-22.04 with Python 3.7. For each job, check out the code, set up Python, upgrade pip, install pipenv 2018.11.26, install pipenv dependencies, and run tests.
